notes: Non-interest-bearing balances have no direct rate repricing.
Administered non-maturity customer rates are mapped outside contractual tenor buckets.
Term deposits use contractual repricing unless a product override is added.
Derivative exposures are driven by collateral and margining assumptions.
Trading and fair-value balances are market-price sensitive.
Fixed-rate liquidity securities are mapped to the swap curve unless challenged.
Issued debt maps to the bank issuance curve.
Short wholesale balances repricing inside one month.
Repo and reverse repo balances repricing inside three months.
Short-term fixed or floating balances repricing inside three months.
Reset or maturity inside one year.
Fixed-rate product mapped from modeled fixed-rate period.
Fixed-rate product mapped from modeled fixed-rate period.
